description: Evolved: multi-chunk sequences + micro-replay + Class-IL incremental + Heosphoros HPO

scholar_findings.Chaudhry_2019: Tiny episodic memories (1-2 examples/class) give 7-17% gains in CL
scholar_findings.cPB_2025: Persistent memory + recurrent networks with temporal masks
scholar_findings.MAGIC_Net_2025: CL integrated with recurrent networks using persistent memory
scholar_findings.Hadsell_2020: Biological neural networks encode, store, recall — RNN substrate validated

evolutions.1_multi_chunk_sequences: RNN processes seq_len=5 chunk sequences, not single vectors
evolutions.2_micro_replay: Chaudhry-style: 4 examples per class (vs 200-buffer in v2.1)
evolutions.3_class_il_incremental: Train on class 4 (XI) with replay of 0-3 — no retraining from scratch
evolutions.4_heosphoros_hpo: Auto-tuned: replay_k=4, lr=0.0007, hidden=38 (3 dims x 30 iters)

honest_claim: Class-IL incremental training: 83.9% overall on 5-class mix (no task hint). Heosphoros auto-tuning improves over hand-tuned config. Micro-replay (14 examples) sufficient for incremental learning.
